recommendations.title: Jack Goes Boating
recommendations.overview: A limo driver's blind date sparks a tale of love, betrayal, friendship and grace—centered on two working-class New York City couples.

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: City Lights
recommendations.overview: A tramp falls in love with a beautiful blind flower girl. His on-and-off friendship with a wealthy man allows him to be the girl's benefactor and suitor.

recommendations.title: The Water Diviner
recommendations.overview: In 1919, Australian farmer Joshua Connor travels to Turkey to discover the fate of his three sons, reported missing in action. Holding on to hope, Joshua must travel across the war-torn landscape to find the truth and his own peace.

recommendations.title: My Blind Brother
recommendations.overview: Love for the same woman causes conflict between an over-achieving blind athlete and the brother who made him that way.

recommendations.title: Our Father
recommendations.overview: Two young boys, Valerio and Christian, form a powerful friendship over the summer.

recommendations.title: 7th Heaven
recommendations.overview: In 1910s Paris, a sewer worker disillusioned with Christianity feels his prayers have been answered when he chances upon a street waif and they fall in love.

recommendations.title: Ricordi?
recommendations.overview: A long love story, seen through the memories of one young couple. The journey through the years of two individuals, united, divided, happy, unhappy, deeply in love, or in love with others, in a single stream of emotions and shades of feeling. Over th

recommendations.title: Turtles All the Way Down
recommendations.overview: Aza confronts her potential for love, happiness, friendship, and hope while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts.

recommendations.title: Toy Story 3
recommendations.overview: Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.
